Non-food contact surface or equipment ma.en: Non-food contact surface or equipment made of unacceptable material, not kept clean, or not properly sealed, raised, spaced or movable to allow accessibility for cleaning on all sides, above and underneath the unit.
Non-food contact surface or equipment ma.zh: 非食品接触面或设备材质不合规、未保持清洁,或未妥善密封、抬高、留出间距或可移动,以致无法从各侧、上方及下方进行清洁。

Food, supplies, or equipment not protect.en: Food, supplies, or equipment not protected from potential source of contamination during storage, preparation, transportation, display, service or from customer’s refillable, reusable container. Condiments not in single-service containers or dispensed directly by the vendor.
Food, supplies, or equipment not protect.zh: 食品、用品或设备在储存、加工、运输、陈列、供餐时,或来自顾客可重复灌装/使用的容器时,未防止潜在污染源。调味品未使用一次性容器,亦未由商家直接分发。

Cold TCS food item held above 41 °F; smo.en: Cold TCS food item held above 41 °F; smoked or processed fish held above 38 °F; intact raw eggs held above 45 °F; or reduced oxygen packaged (ROP) TCS foods held above required temperatures except during active necessary preparation.
Cold TCS food item held above 41 °F; smo.zh: 冷藏温控食品(TCS)存放温度高于41°F;烟熏或加工鱼类高于38°F;带壳生鸡蛋高于45°F;或减氧包装(ROP)TCS食品高于规定温度(积极必要的加工过程除外)。

Food contact surface not properly washed.en: Food contact surface not properly washed, rinsed and sanitized after each use and following any activity when contamination may have occurred.
Food contact surface not properly washed.zh: 食品接触面在每次使用后及可能发生污染的操作后,未妥善清洗、漂洗和消毒。

Anti-siphonage or back-flow prevention d.en: Anti-siphonage or back-flow prevention device not provided where required; equipment or floor not properly drained; sewage disposal system in disrepair or not functioning properly. Condensation or liquid waste improperly disposed of.
Anti-siphonage or back-flow prevention d.zh: 应设而未设防虹吸/防回流装置;设备或地面排水不畅;污水排放系统失修或运行不正常。冷凝水或液态废弃物处置不当。

Food Protection Certificate (FPC) not he.en: Food Protection Certificate (FPC) not held by manager or supervisor of food operations.
Food Protection Certificate (FPC) not he.zh: 食品操作的经理或主管未持有食品保护证书(FPC)。

Establishment is not free of harborage o.en: Establishment is not free of harborage or conditions conducive to rodents, insects or other pests.
Establishment is not free of harborage o.zh: 场所存在利于鼠类、昆虫或其他虫害藏匿或滋生的条件。

Filth flies or food/refuse/sewage associ.en: Filth flies or food/refuse/sewage associated (FRSA) flies or other nuisance pests in establishment’s food and/or non-food areas. FRSA flies include house flies, blow flies, bottle flies, flesh flies, drain flies, Phorid flies and fruit flies.
Filth flies or food/refuse/sewage associ.zh: 场所食品和/或非食品区域存在污蝇或与食品/垃圾/污水相关(FRSA)的蝇类或其他有害虫害。FRSA蝇类包括家蝇、丽蝇、绿蝇、麻蝇、蛾蠓、蚤蝇和果蝇。

Walls/Ceilings Designed Constructed Inst.zh: 墙面/天花板的设计、施工与安装

Single service article not provided. Sin.en: Single service article not provided. Single service article reused or not protected from contamination when transported, stored, dispensed. Drinking straws not completely enclosed in wrapper or dispensed from a sanitary device.
Single service article not provided. Sin.zh: 未提供一次性用品;一次性用品被重复使用,或在运输、储存、分发时未防止污染;饮用吸管未完全密封于包装内,亦未由卫生装置分发。

Evidence of mice or live mice in establi.en: Evidence of mice or live mice in establishment's food or non-food areas.
Evidence of mice or live mice in establi.zh: 场所食品或非食品区域存在鼠患迹象或活鼠。

Food contact surface, refillable, reusab.en: Food contact surface, refillable, reusable containers, or equipment improperly constructed, placed or maintained. Unacceptable material used. Culinary sink or other acceptable method not provided for washing food.
Food contact surface, refillable, reusab.zh: 食品接触面、可灌装/重复使用容器或设备的构造、放置或维护不当;使用不合规材质;未提供洗菜池或其他合规方式清洗食品。

Wiping cloths not stored clean and dry,.en: Wiping cloths not stored clean and dry, or in a sanitizing solution, between uses.
Wiping cloths not stored clean and dry,.zh: 抹布在两次使用之间未保持清洁干燥,或未浸放于消毒液中。

Hot TCS food item not held at or above 1.en: Hot TCS food item not held at or above 140 °F.
Hot TCS food item not held at or above 1.zh: 热藏温控食品(TCS)未保持在140°F及以上。

Personal cleanliness is inadequate. Oute.en: Personal cleanliness is inadequate. Outer garment soiled with possible contaminant. Effective hair restraint not worn where required. Jewelry worn on hands or arms. Fingernail polish worn or fingernails not kept clean and trimmed.
Personal cleanliness is inadequate. Oute.zh: 个人卫生不达标:外衣沾有可能的污染物;应戴而未戴有效发套/发网;手部或手臂佩戴首饰;涂指甲油或指甲未保持清洁修剪。

Floors Designed Constructed Installed.zh: 地面的设计、施工与安装

Single Service Articles Stored Dispensed.zh: 一次性用品的储存与分发

Raw, cooked or prepared food is adultera.en: Raw, cooked or prepared food is adulterated, contaminated, cross-contaminated, or not discarded in accordance with HACCP plan.
Raw, cooked or prepared food is adultera.zh: 生食、熟食或预制食品掺假、被污染、发生交叉污染,或未按HACCP计划废弃。

Sanitized equipment or utensil, includin.en: Sanitized equipment or utensil, including in-use food dispensing utensil, improperly used or stored.
Sanitized equipment or utensil, includin.zh: 已消毒的设备或器具(含使用中的分餐器具)使用或存放不当。

No hand washing facility in or adjacent.en: No hand washing facility in or adjacent to toilet room or within 25 feet of a food preparation, food service or warewashing area. Hand washing facility not accessible, obstructed or used for non-hand washing purposes. No hot and cold running water, or water at inadequate pressure.
No hand washing facility in or adjacent.zh: 厕所内或邻近处、或食品加工/供餐/洗消区25英尺内无洗手设施;洗手设施无法使用、被阻挡或被挪作他用;无冷热流动水或水压不足。

Garbage receptacle not pest or water res.en: Garbage receptacle not pest or water resistant, with tight-fitting lids, and covered except while in active use. Garbage receptacle and cover not cleaned after emptying and prior to reuse. Garbage, refuse and other solid and liquid waste not collected, stored, removed and disposed of so as to prevent a nuisance.
Garbage receptacle not pest or water res.zh: 垃圾容器不防虫害/不防水、无严密盖、非使用时未加盖;垃圾容器及盖倒空后再用前未清洗;垃圾、废弃物及其他固液态废物未妥善收集、储存、清运和处置以防滋扰。

Floors Walls and Ceilings-Cleanability.zh: 地面、墙面和天花板——可清洁性 (C)

IMPROPER RECEPTACLE NON-RESIDENTIAL 1ST.zh: 非住宅垃圾容器不合规(首次)(§16-120)

OL - Food service establishment fails to.en: OL - Food service establishment fails to display sign that states "Plastic straws available upon request" in a size of at least 2 inches by 7 inches in font size 20 point or larger. (§NYC Admin Code § 16-401(c)(3))
OL - Food service establishment fails to.zh: 餐饮场所未张贴“如需塑料吸管请索取”标识(尺寸至少2英寸×7英寸、字号20磅及以上)。(§NYC Admin Code § 16-401(c)(3))

Dishwashing and ware washing: Cleaning a.en: Dishwashing and warewashing: Cleaning and sanitizing of tableware, including dishes, utensils, and equipment, deficient.
Dishwashing and ware washing: Cleaning a.zh: 洗碗及餐具洗消:餐具(碗碟、器具)及设备的清洗和消毒不达标。

Test Kit Provided.zh: 配备消毒液检测试剂盒

Good Repair and Proper Adjustment-Equipm.en: Good Repair and Proper Adjustment - Equipment (C)
Good Repair and Proper Adjustment-Equipm.zh: 设备完好维修与正确调校 (C)

Inadequate Facilities/Cooling Methods.zh: 冷却设施/冷却方法不足

Food Storage-Preventing Contamination fr.en: Food Storage - Preventing Contamination from the Premises (C)
Food Storage-Preventing Contamination fr.zh: 食品储存——防止来自场所的污染 (C)

OP OF A S W CAFE RDWY CAFE W O A LICENSE.en: OPERATION OF A SIDEWALK CAFE / ROADWAY CAFE WITHOUT A LICENSE - REVOCATION BY CONSENT, 1ST OFFENSE (§34 RCNY)
OP OF A S W CAFE RDWY CAFE W O A LICENSE.zh: 无照经营人行道/路侧餐座——经同意吊销执照(首次违规)(§34RCNY)

CL - REFUND POLICY IS NOT POSTED AT EACH.en: CL - REFUND POLICY IS NOT POSTED AT EACH CASH REGISTER, OR AT EACH POINT OF SALE, OR AT EACH STORE ENTRANCE, OR REFUND POLICY IS NOT POSTED CONSPICUOUSLY (§6 RCNY § 5-37 - REFUND POLICY)
CL - REFUND POLICY IS NOT POSTED AT EACH.zh: 退款政策未在每个收银台、每个销售点或每个店铺入口张贴,或未显著张贴。(§6 RCNY § 5-37)

Failure to maintain a sufficient supply.en: Failure to maintain a sufficient supply of single-use, non-compostable plastic straws.
Failure to maintain a sufficient supply.zh: 未储备足量一次性不可堆肥塑料吸管。

Accurate thermometer not provided or pro.en: Accurate thermometer not provided or properly located in refrigerated, cold storage or hot holding equipment.
Accurate thermometer not provided or pro.zh: 冷藏、冷冻储存或热藏设备未配备准确温度计或温度计位置不当。

Live roaches in facility's food or non-f.en: Live roaches in facility's food or non-food area.
Live roaches in facility's food or non-f.zh: 场所食品或非食品区域存在活蟑螂。

Current letter grade or Grade Pending ca.en: Current letter grade or Grade Pending card not posted.
Current letter grade or Grade Pending ca.zh: 未张贴现行字母评级卡或“评级待定”卡。

Swollen, leaking, rusted or otherwise da.en: Swollen, leaking, rusted or otherwise damaged canned food to be returned to distributor not segregated from intact product and clearly labeled DO NOT USE.
Swollen, leaking, rusted or otherwise da.zh: 待退回经销商的胀罐、渗漏、生锈或其他受损罐头食品,未与完好产品分开存放并明确标注“请勿使用”。

Food, prohibited, from unapproved or unk.en: Food prohibited, from unapproved or unknown source, home canned or home prepared. Animal slaughtered, butchered or dressed (eviscerated, skinned) in establishment. Reduced Oxygen Packaged (ROP) fish not frozen before processing. ROP food prepared on premises transported to another site.
Food, prohibited, from unapproved or unk.zh: 食品来自未批准或不明来源、家庭自制罐头或家庭自制而被禁用;在场所内屠宰、宰割或整理动物(去内脏、剥皮);减氧包装(ROP)鱼类加工前未冷冻;现场制作的ROP食品被运往他处。

Current valid permit to operate a food s.en: Current valid permit to operate a food service establishment issued by the Department of Health and Mental Hygiene not provided, in that the permit application was incomplete. FSE was in operation at the time of the inspection. Operator failed to respond to two 10-day letters sent on 4/18/25 and 4/28/25. Corrective action: Operator was instructed to complete the permit application at the NYC Department of Consumer and Worker Protection (DCWP) located at 42 Broadway, Lobby, NY, NY, 10004. NYCHC 81.05(a) (§NYCHC 81.05(a))
Current valid permit to operate a food s.zh: 未提供由卫生与心理卫生局(DOHMH)签发的有效餐饮经营许可证,因许可申请不完整。检查时该餐饮场所仍在营业。经营者未回应4/18/25和4/28/25发出的两封10日通知函。整改:经营者被要求前往纽约市消费者与劳工保护局(DCWP,42 Broadway大堂)补全许可申请。NYCHC 81.05(a)(§NYCHC 81.05(a))

Fixture's not properly shielded.zh: 照明灯具未妥善加装防护罩。

Temperature Measuring Devices Manual an.en: Temperature Measuring Devices, Manual and Mechanical Warewashing (Pf)
Temperature Measuring Devices Manual an.zh: 手动及机械洗消的测温装置 (Pf)

Food Display-Preventing Contamination by.en: Food Display - Preventing Contamination by Consumers (P)
Food Display-Preventing Contamination by.zh: 食品陈列——防止顾客造成污染 (P)

Maintaining Premises Unnecessary Items.en: Maintaining Premises, Unnecessary Items and Litter (C)
Maintaining Premises Unnecessary Items.zh: 场所维护——无用物品与杂物垃圾 (C)

Manual and Mechanical Warewashing Equipm.en: Manual and Mechanical Warewashing Equipment, Chemical Sanitization - Temperature, pH, Concentration and Hardness (P)
Manual and Mechanical Warewashing Equipm.zh: 手动及机械洗消设备,化学消毒——温度、pH、浓度与硬度 (P)

Where to Wash (Pf).zh: 洗手地点(在指定水池洗手)(Pf)

Unclean or degraded floors, walls or cei.en: Unclean or degraded floors, walls or ceilings (low risk).
Unclean or degraded floors, walls or cei.zh: 地面、墙面或天花板不洁或破损(低风险)。

DIRTY SIDEWALK COMM MAN INDUSTRIAL MIXED.en: DIRTY SIDEWALK - COMMERCIAL / MANUFACTURING / INDUSTRIAL / MIXED USE, 1ST (§16-118)
DIRTY SIDEWALK COMM MAN INDUSTRIAL MIXED.zh: 人行道不洁——商业/制造/工业/混合用途(首次)(§16-118)

OPERATION OF A S W CAFE RDWY CAFE W O A.en: OPERATION OF A SIDEWALK CAFE / ROADWAY CAFE WITHOUT A LICENSE - REVOCATION BY CONSENT, REPEAT (§34 RCNY)
OPERATION OF A S W CAFE RDWY CAFE W O A.zh: 无照经营人行道/路侧餐座——经同意吊销执照(再次违规)(§34RCNY)

FIRE PROTECTION SYSTEMS:FAIL TO PREVENT.en: FIRE PROTECTION SYSTEMS: FAILURE TO PREVENT UNNECESSARY, UNWARRANTED ALARMS (§VC12)
FIRE PROTECTION SYSTEMS:FAIL TO PREVENT.zh: 消防系统:未能防止不必要、无正当理由的误报警(§VC12)

AFFIDAVITS, DESIGN INSTALLATION DOCUMENT.en: AFFIDAVITS, DESIGN/INSTALLATION DOCUMENTS, AND OTHER DOCUMENTATION (§VC19)
AFFIDAVITS, DESIGN INSTALLATION DOCUMENT.zh: 宣誓书、设计/安装文件及其他证明文件(缺失或不合规)(§VC19)

FAILURE TO MAINTAIN BUILDING IN CODE-COM.en: FAILURE TO MAINTAIN BUILDING IN CODE-COMPLIANT MANNER (§AC 28-301.1)
FAILURE TO MAINTAIN BUILDING IN CODE-COM.zh: 未按规范要求维护建筑物(§AC 28-301.1)

Wash hands sign not posted near or above.en: Wash hands sign not posted near or above hand washing sink.
Wash hands sign not posted near or above.zh: 洗手池附近或上方未张贴“请洗手”标识。

Caloric content not posted on menus,.en: Caloric content not posted on menus, menu boards or food item tags as required.
Caloric content not posted on menus,.zh: 菜单、菜单板或食品标签上未按要求标示热量(卡路里)含量。

Failure to post or conspicuously post he.en: Failure to post or conspicuously post healthy eating information.
Failure to post or conspicuously post he.zh: 未张贴或未显著张贴健康饮食信息。

Tobacco or electronic cigarette use, eat.en: Tobacco or electronic cigarette use, eating, or drinking from open container in food preparation, food storage or dishwashing area.
Tobacco or electronic cigarette use, eat.zh: 在食品加工、食品储存或洗碗区吸烟/使用电子烟、进食或用开口容器饮水。

Live animal other than fish in tank or s.en: Live animal other than fish in tank or service animal present in facility’s food or non-food area.
Live animal other than fish in tank or s.zh: 场所食品或非食品区域出现活体动物(缸中鱼类或服务性动物除外)。

Food Protection Certificate not availabl.en: Food Protection Certificate not available for inspection.
Food Protection Certificate not availabl.zh: 食品保护证书无法供检查查验。

Food containing a prohibited substance h.en: Food containing a prohibited substance held, kept, offered, prepared, processed, packaged, or served.
Food containing a prohibited substance h.zh: 含有禁用物质的食品被存放、保存、提供、加工、处理、包装或供餐。

“Choking first aid” poster not posted. “.en: “Choking first aid” poster not posted. “Alcohol and Pregnancy” warning sign not posted. Resuscitation equipment: exhaled air resuscitation masks (adult & pediatric), latex gloves, and sign not posted.
“Choking first aid” poster not posted. “.zh: 未张贴“噎食急救”海报;未张贴“饮酒与妊娠”警示牌;未配备/张贴急救设备:呼气式人工呼吸面罩(成人及儿童)、乳胶手套及标识。

Food adulterated or misbranded. Adultera.en: Food adulterated or misbranded. Adulterated or misbranded food possessed, being manufactured, produced, packaged, offered for sale or sold.
Food adulterated or misbranded. Adultera.zh: 食品掺假或标示不实;持有、生产、制造、包装、待售或销售掺假或标示不实的食品。

Pesticide not properly labeled or used b.en: Pesticide not properly labeled or used by unlicensed individual. Pesticide or other toxic chemical improperly used/stored. Unprotected, unlocked bait station used.
Pesticide not properly labeled or used b.zh: 杀虫剂未正确标识或由无证人员使用;杀虫剂或其他有毒化学品使用/存放不当;使用无防护、未上锁的诱饵站。

Contract with a pest management professi.en: Contract with a pest management professional not in place. Record of extermination activities not kept on premises.
Contract with a pest management professi.zh: 未与专业虫害防治人员签订合同;场所未保存灭虫作业记录。

Allergen or intolerance notice not trans.en: Allergen or intolerance notice not translated into common language when required.
Allergen or intolerance notice not trans.zh: 应翻译时未将过敏原或食物不耐受提示翻译成通用语言。

Maintaining Refuse Areas and Enclosures.zh: 垃圾存放区及围挡的维护 (C)

Outsid.zh: 室外垃圾容器/室外存放区

Mechanical Warewashing Equipment Hot Wa.en: Mechanical Warewashing Equipment, Hot Water Sanitization Temperatures (Pf)
Mechanical Warewashing Equipment Hot Wa.zh: 机械洗消设备,热水消毒温度 (Pf)

Characteristics-Materials for Constructi.en: Characteristics - Materials for Construction and Repair (P)
Characteristics-Materials for Constructi.zh: 特性——用于建造与维修的材料 (P)

Common Name-Working Containers (Pf).zh: 常用名标识——分装工作容器 (Pf)

Clean Equipment & Utensils Storage.zh: 洁净设备与器具的储存

Adequate Number Frequency Vermin Proof.zh: 数量充足、清运频次足够、防虫害鼠患

System Maintained in Good Repair (P).zh: 系统保持完好维修状态 (P)

(A) Equipment Food-Contact Surfaces No.en: (A) Equipment, Food-Contact Surfaces, Nonfood-Contact Surfaces, and Utensils (Pf)
(A) Equipment Food-Contact Surfaces No.zh: (A) 设备、食品接触面、非食品接触面及器具 (Pf)

Storage or Display of Food in Contact wi.en: Storage or Display of Food in Contact with Water or Ice (C)
Storage or Display of Food in Contact wi.zh: 食品储存或陈列时与水或冰接触 (C)

Floors Walls and Ceilings Utility Lin.en: Floors, Walls, and Ceilings, Utility Lines (C)
Floors Walls and Ceilings Utility Lin.zh: 地面、墙面和天花板,管线布置 (C)

Segregation and Location-Distressed Merc.zh: 受损商品的隔离与存放位置 (Pf)

Improper storage of equipment, utensils.en: Improper storage of equipment, utensils or linens (low risk).
Improper storage of equipment, utensils.zh: 设备、器具或布草储存不当(低风险)。

Inadequate and inaccessible handwashing.en: Inadequate and inaccessible handwashing facilities (moderate risk).
Inadequate and inaccessible handwashing.zh: 洗手设施不足且不便取用(中等风险)。

Insufficient hot water or running water.en: Insufficient hot water or running water (moderate risk).
Insufficient hot water or running water.zh: 热水或流动水不足(中等风险)。

Unapproved or unmaintained equipment or.en: Unapproved or unmaintained equipment or utensils (low risk).
Unapproved or unmaintained equipment or.zh: 使用未经批准或未维护的设备或器具(低风险)。

DIRTY AREA COMM MAN INDUSTRIAL MIXED USE.en: DIRTY AREA - COMMERCIAL / MANUFACTURING / INDUSTRIAL / MIXED USE, 1ST (§16-118)
DIRTY AREA COMM MAN INDUSTRIAL MIXED USE.zh: 区域不洁——商业/制造/工业/混合用途(首次)(§16-118)

IMPROPER RECEPTACLES 1ST OCCURRENCE (§A..zh: 垃圾容器不合规(首次发生)(§A.C.)

FAIL TO CLEAN 18 INCH INTO STREET COMM M.en: FAILURE TO CLEAN 18 INCHES INTO STREET - COMMERCIAL / MANUFACTURING / INDUSTRIAL / MIXED USE, 1ST (§16-118)
FAIL TO CLEAN 18 INCH INTO STREET COMM M.zh: 未清扫延伸至街面18英寸范围——商业/制造/工业/混合用途(首次)(§16-118)

STORAGE OF RECEPTACLES COM FAILURE TO RE.en: STORAGE OF RECEPTACLES - COMMERCIAL, FAILURE TO REMOVE RECEPTACLES (§16-120)
STORAGE OF RECEPTACLES COM FAILURE TO RE.zh: 垃圾容器存放——商业场所未及时收回垃圾容器(§16-120)

FAILED TO SUBMIT AN ANNUAL TEST REPORT F.en: FAILED TO SUBMIT AN ANNUAL TEST REPORT FOR A BACKFLOW PREVENTER (§15 RCNY)
FAILED TO SUBMIT AN ANNUAL TEST REPORT F.zh: 未提交防回流装置的年度检测报告(§15 RCNY)

CERTIFICATES OF FITNESS AND CERTIFICATES.en: CERTIFICATES OF FITNESS AND CERTIFICATES OF QUALIFICATION (§VC17)
CERTIFICATES OF FITNESS AND CERTIFICATES.zh: 从业资格证书与资质证书(缺失或不合规)(§VC17)

PORTABLE FIRE EXTINGUISHERS AND FIRE HOS.en: PORTABLE FIRE EXTINGUISHERS AND FIRE HOSES (§VC01)
PORTABLE FIRE EXTINGUISHERS AND FIRE HOS.zh: 便携式灭火器与消防水带(缺失或不合规)(§VC01)

OL - BUSINESS FAILS TO POST OPEN DOOR OR.en: OL - BUSINESS FAILS TO POST OPEN DOOR OR WINDOW COMPLAINT SIGN (§NYC Admin Code § 20-910(f) - B)
OL - BUSINESS FAILS TO POST OPEN DOOR OR.zh: 商家未张贴“开门/开窗营业投诉”标识(违反空调开门营业规定)(§NYC Admin Code § 20-910(f) - B)

Liquid waste not carried to sewer or sew.en: Liquid waste not carried to sewer or sewage disposal system so as to prevent contamination of the premises and its contents, in that the waste line under the 3-compartment sink was observed leaking onto the tiled floor (accumulation up to 2 feet wide) in the rear warewashing area. NYCHC 81.20(b) (§NYCHC 81.20(b))
Liquid waste not carried to sewer or sew.zh: 液态废物未导入下水道或污水排放系统以防污染场所及其物品:后洗消区三格水池下方的排水管漏水至地砖地面(积水宽达2英尺)。NYCHC 81.20(b)(§NYCHC 81.20(b))

Resuscitation equipment consisting of tw.en: Resuscitation equipment consisting of two exhaled air resuscitation masks (adult and pediatric) or one universal exhaled air resuscitation mask, latex gloves and sign not provided, in that 1 universal exhaled air resuscitation mask was missing. 24 RCNY 18-02 (§24 RCNY 18-02)
Resuscitation equipment consisting of tw.zh: 未配备急救复苏设备(两个呼气式人工呼吸面罩[成人及儿童]或一个通用型面罩、乳胶手套及标识):缺少1个通用型呼气式人工呼吸面罩。24 RCNY 18-02(§24 RCNY 18-02)

Evidence of live animal activity other t.en: Evidence of live animal activity other than fish in a tank or a service animal present in the food establishment, in that one white dog (approximately 11 inches in height) was observed leashed and entering the establishment accompanying its owner as the owner ordered, waited, then paid and exited. No good faith effort was made by staff to determine if said dog was a service dog, and a black dog (approximately 9 inches in height) was observed leashed and entering the establishment accompanying its owner. No good faith effort was made.
Evidence of live animal activity other t.zh: 食品场所出现活体动物(缸中鱼类或服务性动物除外):观察到一只白色犬(约11英寸高)系绳随主人进入,主人点餐、等候、付款后离开;店员未善意核实该犬是否为服务犬;另一只黑色犬(约9英寸高)系绳随主人进入,店员同样未作善意核实。

Supplies or equipment stored under or ne.en: Supplies or equipment stored under or near source(s) of contamination, in that approximately 30 each of single-service bowls and lids (used for oatmeal storage) were observed stored under an unprotected waste pipe inside the cabinet under the handwash sink in the front food prep/service area. NYCHC 81.07(i) (§NYCHC 81.07(i))
Supplies or equipment stored under or ne.zh: 用品或设备存放于污染源下方或附近:约30个一次性碗及碗盖(用于盛放燕麦)存放于前加工/供餐区洗手池下方橱柜内、无防护的排水管下方。NYCHC 81.07(i)(§NYCHC 81.07(i))

Temperature of at least 65 °F (18.3 °C).en: Temperature of at least 65 °F (18.3 °C) not maintained in a commercial building when the outside temperature is less than 50 °F (10 °C) during working hours. Outside temperature recorded at 25 °F. 59 °F recorded in the rear warewashing/storage area, 63 °F recorded in both the middle customer service/seating area and the rear seating area, and 64 °F recorded in the front food prep/service area. NYCHC 131.07(c)(2) (§NYCHC 131.07(c)(2))
Temperature of at least 65 °F (18.3 °C).zh: 工作时段室外温度低于50°F(10°C)时,商业建筑内未维持至少65°F(18.3°C):室外温度25°F;后洗消/储存区59°F;中部顾客服务/就座区及后就座区均为63°F;前加工/供餐区64°F。NYCHC 131.07(c)(2)(§NYCHC 131.07(c)(2))

Evidence of live animal activity other t.en: Evidence of live animal activity other than fish in a tank or a service animal present in the food establishment, in that one white dog (approximately 11 inches in height) was observed leashed and entering the establishment accompanying its owner as the owner ordered, waited, then paid and exited. No good faith effort was made by staff to determine if said dog was a service dog; and a black dog (approximately 9 inches in height) was observed leashed and entering the establishment accompanying its owner as the owner ordered, waited, then paid, sat down and consumed his order, then exited. No good faith effort was made.
Evidence of live animal activity other t.zh: 食品场所出现活体动物(缸中鱼类或服务性动物除外):观察到一只白色犬(约11英寸高)系绳随主人进入,主人点餐、等候、付款后离开,店员未善意核实该犬是否为服务犬;另观察到一只黑色犬(约9英寸高)系绳随主人进入,主人点餐、等候、付款后坐下用餐再离开,店员同样未作善意核实。
